goals: Explore the project structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Find files that might contain film-related content or movie data
Search within relevant files to understand how the project handles films or recommendations

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and enthusiastic, approaches new topics with genuine interest but lacks technical background. Asks questions to learn and understand.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about films and film analysis deeply but has limited technical knowledge. Does not know programming concepts or tool names. Learns about the project through exploration.

end_condition: The user has explored the project structure, found relevant files, and understands what kind of film-related content the project contains.
